title: Tailored Applications, Work Samples, and References · Application Repair Board
summary: A realistic tailored applications, work samples, and references artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in auditable role-specific application packet and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence d…
objectives: Select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements.
Write a concise evidence bridge between the organization problem, relevant contribution, specific proof, and next conversation.
Choose or create a bounded work sample that demonstrates the prioritized behavior without exposing protected material or doing unpaid production work.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Tailoring Map
steps.instruction:
debug case — A generic packet mechanically mirrors a listing, exposes a private work sample, and supplies reference contact details without permission. The debug variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements.

Inspect the Tailoring Map trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Tailoring Map.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for select and reorder truthful evidence from the role matrix without keyword stuffing or mirroring unsupported requirements. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Tailoring Map, keep Tailoring Map connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Tailoring Map, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Tailoring Map.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
